noncomputable
def action [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) (n : в„•) (Пү : probSpace Оұ R) : Оұ :=
  (hist alg Пү n вҹЁn, by simpвҹ©).1

lemma action_zero [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) :
    action alg 0 = fun Пү вҶҰ initAlgFunction alg (Пү.1 0) := by
  ext
  simp [action, hist_zero]

lemma action_add_one_eq [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) (n : в„•) :
    action alg (n + 1) = fun Пү вҶҰ algFunction alg n (hist alg Пү n) (Пү.1 (n + 1)) := by

def reward [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) (n : в„•) (Пү : probSpace Оұ R) : R :=

This is true by the definition of `compProd` and `map` on measures.

import Mathlib

open MeasureTheory

variable [DecidableEq Оұ] [Countable Оұ]

variable [StandardBorelSpace R] [Nonempty R]

variable [StandardBorelSpace Оұ] [Countable Оұ] [DecidableEq Оұ]

variable [StandardBorelSpace R] [Nonempty R]

noncomputable
def action [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) (n : в„•) (Пү : probSpace Оұ R) : Оұ :=
  (hist alg Пү n вҹЁn, by simpвҹ©).1

noncomputable
def reward [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) (n : в„•) (Пү : probSpace Оұ R) : R :=
  (hist alg Пү n вҹЁn, by simpвҹ©).2

lemma action_zero [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) :
    action alg 0 = fun Пү вҶҰ initAlgFunction alg (Пү.1 0) := by
  ext
  simp [action, hist_zero]

lemma action_add_one_eq [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) (n : в„•) :
    action alg (n + 1) = fun Пү вҶҰ algFunction alg n (hist alg Пү n) (Пү.1 (n + 1)) := by
  ext Пү
  simp [action, hist_add_one]

lemma reward_zero [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) :
    reward alg 0 = fun Пү вҶҰ Пү.2 0 (action alg 0 Пү) := by
  ext
  simp [reward, hist_zero, action_zero]

lemma reward_add_one [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) (n : в„•) :
    reward alg (n + 1) =
      fun Пү вҶҰ Пү.2 (pullCount' n (hist alg Пү n) (action alg (n + 1) Пү)) (action alg (n + 1) Пү) := by
  ext Пү
  simp [reward, hist_add_one, action_add_one_eq]

lemma reward_eq [DecidableEq Оұ] (alg : Algorithm Оұ R) (n : в„•) :
    reward alg n = fun Пү вҶҰ Пү.2 (pullCount (action alg) (action alg n Пү) n Пү) (action alg n Пү) := by
  cases n with
  | zero => ext; simp [reward_zero, action_zero]
  | succ n =>
    ext Пү
    rw [reward, hist_add_one]
    simp only [add_le_iff_nonpos_right, nonpos_iff_eq_zero, one_ne_zero, вҶ“reduceDIte]
    rw [action_add_one_eq, pullCount_eq_pullCount' (R' := reward alg) (by simp)]
    simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one]
    rw [hist_eq]
    rfl
